hero.badge: Now with Digital Marketing built in
hero.subtitle: Afera brings contacts, deals, accounting, and marketing into one place — so you can stop juggling a dozen apps and actually close deals.

features.label: Everything in one place
features.title:
Stop switching tabs.
Start closing deals.
features.subtitle: Afera packs a full sales stack into a single, surprisingly pleasant app. Like Marie Kondo, but for your business tools.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Revenue, contacts, open deals, net balance — all at a glance. Start every morning knowing exactly how you're doing.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.desc: Your entire network, organized. Track readiness, assign deals, and know when to follow up before they ghost you.

deals.title: Deals
deals.desc: Pipeline management with a Kanban board and charts. Watch deals move from "maybe" to "money". Celebrate accordingly.

accounting.title: Accounting
accounting.desc: Revenue, expenses, taxes, documents — tracked cleanly in CHF (or your currency). No more shoebox of receipts.

marketing.title: Digital Marketing
marketing.desc: Email campaigns, landing pages, social posts, and automation workflows. Reach your leads professionally (not spammily).

contacts.label: 👥 Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Stop losing track of who's who. Afera keeps your entire network organized, searchable, and — most importantly — not in a pile on your desk.
contacts.readinessHint: Know exactly who to call today

readiness.title: Sales readiness levels
readiness.desc: Cold → Exploring → Interested → Evaluating → Ready → Buyer. Because "maybe someday" is not a pipeline stage.

activity.title: Activity tracking
activity.desc: Log calls, emails, meetings. Know the last time you actually talked to someone.

deals.title: Deal association
deals.desc: Link contacts to deals automatically. See the full picture in one click.

export.title: Bulk operations & CSV export
export.desc: Clean up your list, export to spreadsheet, send to your accountant. Done.

deals.label: 🤝 Deals
deals.subtitle: Visualize every deal from first contact to signed contract. Kanban board, charts, conversion rates — everything you need to close more and guess less.
features: Monthly deal stats and trend charts
Deal value in CHF (or your currency)
deals.videoSub: Replace with product walkthrough video · recommended 1280×720

accounting.label: 💰 Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Track every franc in, every expense out. Attach receipts, apply the right tax rate, and hand your accountant something they'll actually smile at.

revenue.title: Revenue tracking
revenue.desc: Services, products, consulting, licensing, subscriptions — all categorized and summed up beautifully.

expenses.title: Expense management
expenses.desc: Salaries, software, marketing, travel... yes, even that 'team lunch' counts.

docs.title: Document attachments
docs.desc: Attach PDFs, invoices, receipts directly to entries. No more lost paperwork.

linked.title: Linked to deals & contacts
linked.desc: Every revenue entry can trace back to a deal or contact. Accountability, built in.

balance.title: Net balance at a glance
balance.desc: Revenue minus expenses, by month or year. The number that matters, front and center.

export.title: CSV export
export.desc: Export everything for your accountant in one click. They'll send you holiday cards.

accounting.taxNote: Because every country does taxes differently. Ours is just more fun.

marketing.label: 🚀 Digital Marketing
marketing.subtitle: Email campaigns, landing pages, social posts, and automation workflows — all inside Afera. Your marketing agency will be impressed. Or jealous.

newsletters.title: Email Campaigns that actually get opened
newsletters.desc: Send targeted newsletters to your contacts. Track opens, manage campaigns, and stop wondering if anyone is reading your emails. (Spoiler: they are.)

landing.title: Landing Pages that convert visitors into leads
landing.desc: Build drag-and-drop landing pages without touching a single line of code. Your designer friend will still be impressed (don't tell them how easy it was).
bullets: Multiple pages, all in one place

social.title: Social Media posts, written and scheduled
social.desc: Plan your social content across platforms. Write posts, schedule them, and actually maintain a consistent online presence for once.

email.title: Drag-and-drop Email Builder
email.desc: Create beautiful email templates without crying. Headers, heroes, buttons, columns, product blocks — drag them in, style them up, send them out.
bullets: 12+ block types (Header, Hero, Text, Image, Button…)

workflows.title: Automation that works while you sleep
workflows.desc: Set up email sequences and qualification workflows that run automatically. It's like having a salesperson who never takes breaks (or coffee).

pricing.label: 💎 Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Try everything free for 30 days. No credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready — or don't, we're not your boss.
pricing.note: 🔒 No credit card required to start · ✅ Cancel anytime · 🇨🇭 Prices in CHF

trial.name: Free Trial
trial.desc: Full access for 30 days. No credit card. No strings attached.

monthly.name: Monthly
monthly.desc: Everything, unlimited. Pay month to month, cancel whenever.

annual.name: Annual
annual.desc: Same as Monthly, but smarter. Save CHF 39.98 per year.

cta.desc: Join the businesses that stopped juggling spreadsheets and started actually selling. Your future self will thank you. So will your accountant.
cta.startFree: Start for free — no card needed ✨
cta.spText: who've got better things to do than fight with their CRM

footer.tagline: The CRM that doesn't make you want to cry.
